subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that He speaketh the truth in this station, which hath been named with the Most Beautiful Names in the Sacred Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه ینطق بالحق فی هذا المقام الذی سمی بالاسماء الحسنی فی الصحیفه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @station of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment
